caption: A woman is seen in a medium close-up shot, positioned in front of a light-colored wall and a green curtain. She has dark hair and is wearing a striped button-down shirt and a black over-the-ear headset with a microphone. The text "Nancy Ramya" is visible in the bottom left corner of the scene. As the sequence progresses, she looks slightly to her right and speaks, with her mouth opening and closing as she articulates words. Her facial expression is serious, and she remains centrally framed throughout the clip. The background remains static, showing the curtain to her left and a plain wall behind her. There are no other people or significant objects present in the frame besides her clothing and equipment.
